creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Mina Galić from comment #2)
As far I see php83-pecl-xmlrpc-1.0.0.r3_2,1 store into xmlrpc.so incorrect place.

I see same numbers in 6e3887a5d3ce3430e460efabaa4d7f3af22bab02 / Mk/Uses/php.mk and suspect that PHP_EXT_INC should be extended for pecl-xmlrpc.
